title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.014 - Executive director appointed by board, not to be board member — powers and duties
text:
103.014.  Executive director appointed by board, not to be board member — powers and duties. — The board shall appoint an executive director, not one of their number, who shall be the executive officer of the board and shall have charge of the offices, records and employees of the plan, subject to the direction of the board.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 7)
